title: pouteria eluviicola
intro: Pouteria eluviicola, also known as the forest walnut, is a tree species native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Pouteria eluviicola include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Pouteria eluviicola include decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are often used to treat various ailments, such as skin infections and respiratory issues.
